data.title: RCI Reports 2Q26 Sales
data.description: In Houston, RCI Hospitality Holdings, Inc. disclosed their club and sports bar-restaurant sales figures for the fiscal 2026 second quarter ending on March 31, 2026. Excluding non-core operations, the total sales, as reported on Nasdaq under RICK, showed a year-over-year increase. Interim President and CEO, Travis Reese, mentioned that the total sales of nightclubs witnessed growth, while same-store sales remained relatively stable. The recent acquisitions and new opening locations made significant positive contributions, compensating for prior fluctuations. Final figures are pending closure and verification.

data.title: PPI, a Kaplan Company, Named Exclusive Licensure Prep Partner of the Society of Women Engineers
data.description: PPI, a Kaplan Company, based in Fort Lauderdale, Florida, has revealed its new role as the sole licensure prep partner for the Society of Women Engineers. This partnership signifies a significant collaboration in the education sector.

data.title: Crypto dev Joe Schiarizzi runs for Congress in VA. Criticizes pro-crypto lawmakers in D.C. for lacking understanding.
data.description: According to Ethereum developer Joe Schiarizzi, a majority of pro-crypto legislators in Washington D.C. are primarily interested in financial gains and lack a comprehensive understanding of the technology or its potential implications.
INTEL AND GOOGLE ANNOUNCE A LONG-TERM PARTNERSHIP TO IMPROVE AI INFRASTRUCTURE USING XEON CPUS AND CUSTOM IPUS.

data.title: Texas Roadhouse, Inc. to Announce First Quarter Earnings on May 7, 2026
data.description: Louisville, Kentucky-based Texas Roadhouse, Inc. (NasdaqGS: TXRH) has revealed its plan to unveil the financial results for the first quarter of 2026 on Thursday, May 7, 2026, post the market's closing. Following this, a conference call is scheduled for 5:00 PM ET and will be streamed live on the investor relations section of the company's official website at www.texasroadhouse.com.

data.title: Research From AvePoint and Omdia Reveals Governance and Compliance as the Leading AI Adoption Barrier Among MSPs
data.description: Members of the Scottish Parliament (MSPs) are advocating for increased platform integration due to the rapid advancement of artificial intelligence (AI). A survey revealed that 49% of MSPs are in favor of a fully integrated platform, while a significant 91% are seeking integrated backup and recovery systems. This push for greater integration comes as AI technologies continue to evolve and play a more prominent role in various sectors.

data.title: eToro Group Ltd. to Announce First Quarter Results and Hold Investor Webcast on May 12, 2026
data.description: The trading and investing platform, eToro Group Ltd., will be reporting its financial results for the first quarter of 2026 on Tuesday, May 12, 2026, before the market opens. The announcement will be followed by a webcast at 8:30 AM ET / 5:30 AM PT on the same day. eToro trades under the ticker symbol ETOR on the NASDAQ stock exchange.

data.title: Abercrombie & Fitch and Sperry Reunite After Six Decades, Reviving a Partnership From the 1930s
data.description: The retailer that first introduced Sperry Top-Siders nationwide is making a comeback with a contemporary collection inspired by its rich heritage. This new capsule collection blends modern styles with the brand's authentic history. With an initial launch consisting of X unique pieces, the collaboration aims to revive the classic appeal of Sperry Top-Siders and appeal to both longtime fans and new customers.

data.title: The Oncology Institute to Participate in the 25th Annual Needham Healthcare Conference
data.description: In CERRITOS, California, The Oncology Institute, Inc. (NASDAQ: TOI), a major value-based oncology organization in the U.S., stated that Dr. Daniel Virnich, CEO, and Rob Carter, CFO, will join the 25th Annual Needham Healthcare Conference online on April 15, 2026. Their fireside chat is scheduled for 3:45 p.m. ET.

data.title: Lyndsey Merrill Joins GCM Grosvenor to Expand Firm’s Presence in the Middle East and North Africa
data.description: Chicago-based GCM Grosvenor revealed that Lyndsey Merrill has been appointed as a Managing Director in the Business Development team. Merrill will primarily concentrate on augmenting the company's influence in the Middle East and North Africa (MENA) region, overseeing the sourcing and investment of capital within the area. GCM Grosvenor, listed on Nasdaq as GCMG, is a prominent global provider of alternative asset management solutions.

data.title: Preservation Equity Fund Advisors Completes Full Realization of Fund I
data.description: Preservation Equity Fund Advisors, also known as PEF Advisors, revealed the completion of the successful recapitalization of Dover Woods in Irvine, California on April 9, 2026. This signifies the final asset in WNC California Preservation Equity Fund, L.P. (referred to as "Fund I" or the "Fund"). The recapitalization of Dover Woods marks a significant milestone for the Fund, with this being its last asset to undergo the process.

data.title: Batteries Plus Partners with HOTDISH to Elevate Franchise Development Marketing Strategy
data.description: A top power solutions franchise has teamed up with a strategic marketing agency to boost lead generation and expedite growth in opening multiple units. Batteries Plus, the primary battery and power solutions service provider in the US, disclosed this alliance on April 9, 2026 in Hartland, Wisconsin.

data.title: Aces Wilder Launches 'The Mosaic Collection': Two Women Redefining Menswear for Modern Social Life
data.description: Today marks the release of The Mosaic Collection, the inaugural capsule from Aces Wilder, a burgeoning player in high-end men's clothing. The brand was established by two former finance professionals from New York City and aims to fill a gap in the market. This debut line represents a pivotal moment for Aces Wilder, with a vision to redefine men's fashion.

data.title: New Research Of 511 B2B Leaders Reveals GTM Execution Is Costing Organization Revenue In 2026
data.description: A recent study conducted by Outcomes Rocket revealed that approximately 30% of businesses-to-business organizations in San Diego are uncertain whether their go-to-market strategies are effectively generating tangible results. This uncertainty is attributed to factors such as extended buying processes, increased market competition, changing consumer demands, and fast-paced market transformations.

data.title: Akari Therapeutics Participates in Virtual Investor “What This Means” Interview Discussing Strategic Partnership with WuXi XDC
data.description: Abizer Gaslightwala, the Chief Executive Officer, elaborates on the company's recent collaboration with WuXi XDC and its significance in advancing platform validation and accelerating development.

data.title: The 2026MIECF Builds a Leading Platform for Green Development
data.description: From March 26 to 28, 2026, the Macao International Environmental Co–operation Forum & Exhibition (2026MIECF) took place at the Cotai Expo in Macao, China. The event was organized by the Government of the Macao Special Administrative Region.
Zelenskyy on the visit of Witkoff and Kushner to Ukraine: 'We will find a date after the Easter holidays'

data.title: NYSE Content Update: Fourth Annual NYSE Sustainability Leaders Summit to Commence
data.description: The New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) has released its daily pre-market advisory directly from the trading floor for April 9, 2026. This update is accessible through PRNewswire. Investors can gain valuable market insights by referring to the NYSE Pre-market update before the trading day begins. This initiative aims to keep the investment community informed of the latest trends and fluctuations. Make sure to check out today's update for a comprehensive overview of the market landscape.

data.title: Veratad to Sponsor and Host Panel on Industry Trust at Global Age Assurance Standards Summit
data.description: On April 9, 2026, in Teaneck, New Jersey, Veratad Technologies, a prominent company specializing in age and identity verification services, revealed its role as a Bronze Sponsor at the Global Age Assurance Standards Summit scheduled for April 15-17 in Manchester, UK. This important event signifies the company's commitment to supporting industry standards and innovation in age verification solutions.

data.title: $3.7M BTC stolen in cybersecurity breach at Bitcoin Depot, with 50.9 BTC taken from internal systems.
data.description: A total of 50.9 Bitcoins, equivalent to around $3.7 million, was reportedly stolen from Bitcoin Depot by a hacker who managed to breach internal systems connected to corporate wallets.
